NewsGroup
Bringing adoption to Blockchain and Web3, one moon at a time.

MoonEdge accelerates Web3 adoption by launching and incubating prominent start-ups within high performing verticals: including Gaming, DeFi, Scaling Solutions, ZK Technology and also broader horizon, such as Healthcare, AR/VR in Sports and Fashion.

Academy
Explore more
VC

MoonEdge Opens Evermoon VC Round for Tier 6 & Tier 7 Stakers

VC

Get ready, MoonEdge community! As part of our ongoing commitment to bring premier investment opportunities to our valued stakers, we are ecstatic to announce an exclusive VC round for the top-tier Web3 gaming project, Evermoon.

MoonEdge Proudly Announces VC Community Rounds

How To Participate In MoonEdge IDO?

All-Encompassing Support

We understand the unique challenges of the web3 space and have designed our services to address them effectively. With MoonEdge, you gain access to expert guidance, strategic partnerships, and a wealth of resources to empower your project at every stage. We've designed a one-stop solution for your project's every need, from inception to post-launch success.

We're committed to guiding you through every challenge, making sure your vision becomes a reality in the most impactful way.

Incubation Program

Incubation, project advisory and connection to key industry partners.

Tokenomics Design

Full token design scope (e.g., token utility, token distribution, vesting schedule, liquidity, staking).

Marketing Support

Growth strategy, web3 culture, community building and go-to-market.

Early-stage Venture

Introduction to venture capital firms and funds.

Legal Advisory

Legal advisory to follow up-to-date regulations (e.g., for tokens design and projects communication).

Essentials Covered

Security auditors, exchanges, market-makers and legal team.

Guardian

Cryptocurrency, in its nascent stages, remains akin to the uncharted territories of the Wild West. MoonEdge aspires to stand as a pioneering force within the launchpad space, dedicated to bringing the best projects to its community members and safeguarding in case of drawbacks. It is a restless guardian in the realm of high-risk, high-reward ventures. Our community-centric approach is at the core of our mission to offer secure project launches through the MoonEdge Guardian. Our primary goal is to foster a safe ecosystem for our community's active involvement, ensuring that funds are allocated based on project performance.

Learn more
Application

Ready to launch your Web3 project, but you are unsure of the procedure to follow? MoonEdge is here to guide and serve as your gateway to unparalleled success! As a cross-chain incubator and launchpad, we provide comprehensive support to selected startups. Our services include smart contract design, web3 marketing, token launch strategies, and continuous post-launch consultancy. Our all encompassing support provides you with the tools you need for success! We are home to a vibrant community of over 100k crypto enthusiasts. Our track record boasts more than $15 million raised. Elevate your project's potential with MoonEdge. Apply now to be a part of our curated selection of IDOs

Launch with MoonEdge
